name: Film Gate (Brass, CNC)
description: CNC-machined brass C360 film gate with precision aperture (5.79 x 4.01 mm), registration pin bore, and guide rails.

name: Pressure Plate (Spring Steel)
description: Spring-tempered 302 stainless steel pressure plate. Maintains 0.5 N film contact force.

name: Claw Tip (Hardened Steel)
description: Hardened 4140 steel claw tip. Engages film perforations with 4.234 mm stroke.

name: Registration Pin (Steel)
description: Precision-ground 4140 steel registration pin, 0.813 mm diameter (+0/-0.002 mm).

name: Shutter Disc 180 deg (Aluminum)
description: Black-anodized 6061-T6 aluminum shutter disc, 28 mm OD, 180-degree opening.

name: Shutter Disc 135 deg
description: 135-degree opening for longer exposures and increased motion blur.

name: Shutter Disc 220 deg
description: 220-degree opening for shorter exposures. Popular for sports and action.

name: Motor Pre-wired (FF-130SH + JST)
description: Mabuchi FF-130SH DC motor, pre-wired with JST VH 2-pin connector. Plug-and-play.

name: Gear Set (4 Delrin Gears)
description: Complete 2-stage spur gear set in Delrin 150. 6:1 total reduction.

name: Metal Gear Set Upgrade (4 CNC Steel)
description: Premium CNC-machined 4140 steel gear set. Lifetime upgrade.

name: Main PCB (Assembled + Firmware)
description: Fully assembled STM32L031K6 control board with motor driver, encoder, and 7 JST connectors.

name: Power Board (Assembled)
description: Power regulation with reverse-polarity protection and thermal shutdown.

name: Wiring Harness (7 JST Connectors)
description: Complete wire harness with all 7 JST connectors pre-crimped and labeled.

name: C-mount Lens Ring (Aluminum)
description: 6061-T6 aluminum C-mount lens ring, 25.4 mm bore, 32 TPI threads.

name: Bearing Kit (4x 694ZZ)
description: Four 694ZZ miniature bearings (4 mm bore, 11 mm OD). Shielded, pre-lubricated.

name: Complete Fastener Set
description: Every screw, nut, and insert for one complete camera. Sorted and labeled.

name: Maintenance Kit
description: Essential wear items: pressure plate, claw tip, bearings, lens cloth, grease.

name: Printable Parts Filament Kit
description: 1 kg PETG filament spool + printed settings card for all 10 printable parts.

name: Film Transport Module (Pre-assembled)
description: Complete MOD-100: gate, plate, claw, cam, channel, pin — assembled and tested.

name: Shutter Module (Pre-assembled)
description: Complete MOD-200: 180-degree shutter disc on main shaft with bearings.

name: Drivetrain Module (Pre-assembled)
description: Complete MOD-300: motor, gearbox, 4-gear set — assembled and lubricated.

name: Electronics Module (Pre-assembled)
description: Complete MOD-500: main PCB + power board + bracket, firmware flashed.

name: Optics Module (with 6mm f/1.4 Lens)
description: Complete MOD-700: C-mount ring + viewfinder + 6mm f/1.4 lens.

name: Builder Kit (Everything except shell)
description: CNC chassis, all precision parts, PCBs, wiring, fasteners. You 3D-print the shells.

name: Complete Camera (Assembled + Tested)
description: Fully assembled, calibrated camera with 6mm lens, batteries, strap. Ready to shoot.

name: Complete Camera Pro (+ Spares + Shutters)
description: Standard camera + maintenance kit + 135/220-degree shutters + carrying case.

name: Shell Set (PETG, choose color)
description: Complete exterior shell: both body halves, top/bottom plates, both doors. PETG.

name: 6mm f/1.4 C-mount Lens
description: Wide-angle 6mm f/1.4 with manual iris and focus. Multi-coated glass.

name: 12mm f/1.4 C-mount Lens
description: Normal 12mm f/1.4 with manual iris and focus. Classic Super 8 focal length.

name: Comfort Grip Overlay (TPU)
description: Textured TPU grip overlay. Friction-fit, no adhesive needed.

name: Padded Carrying Case
description: Custom-fit padded case for camera, lenses, batteries, and tools.

name: Expansion Slot Cover Plate
description: Blank cover plate for the expansion module slot.
